description.p: Image Compare lets you inspect two or more images side by side or in a stacked view, making it easier to spot subtle visual changes and evaluate differences.

ul.li: Grid layout when four or more images are loaded
Zoom and pan tools, including normalization across image dimensions
Create a heatmap of differences between two images

screenshot.caption: Comparing two images side by side with a heatmap

ul.li: Use a perceptual heatmap metric based on dE00 color difference similar to butteraugli
Simplify heatmap summaries to overall (average) and hotspot (p95) dE00 values
Disable Build Heatmap while a heatmap job is processing
Fix heatmap generation failures for uncommon image band layouts
Add portal-aware drag-and-drop for Flatpak environments
Add keyboard shortcuts for open, heatmap, display mode, and zoom reset
